name: Good Casting
overview: Baek Chan-Mi was a legendary black agent for the NIS, but, due to her excessive work, her subordinate died and she missed catching her intended target. Baek Chan-Mi was punished for that botched case and she now works in a cyber security team for the NIS. Baek Chan-Mi is then selected to go undercover on a case involving intellectual property theft at Korea's largest company.

trailers.title: [Good CastingㅣTeaser Trailer ver2] "The crazy agent is back to the field!"
[Good CastingㅣTeaser Trailer] "Secretary of Baek Jang Mi. She was an agent of NIS"
